examples: Capsule subglobose, ca. 9 mm in diam., valves slightly smooth and flat, not obviously angulate.
Herbs annual. Stems decumbent or erect, 30-90 cm tall, branched, angulate , with sparse retrorse prickles along angles.
Main Outcome Measurements: The capsule was manipulated in the esophagus for 10 minutes. It was easy to make the capsule turn somersaults and to angulate at the cardioesophageal junction.
